title: Bridge Essay: Relative activation patterns associated with self-transcendent and self-enhancem

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Relative activation patterns associated with self-transcendent and self-enhancement core values: An fMRI study of basic human values theory concepts in males.** — Soc Neurosci. PMID: 30907717. DOI: 10.1080/17470919.2019.1598893. Core values have been shown to influence avariety of social behaviors, but research on the brain networks supporting their effects is sparse. While undergoing fMRI scanning, twenty male participants evaluated descriptions of real-world activities according to how worthwhile they were and how likely they were to participate in them. Each activity was categorized according to contexts conceptualized in the Basic Human Values Theory (BHVT) model of core values. We investigated two Self-enhancement...
